body: Hi there! Fall mini-sessions at Larry Rawlings Photography are now open. 20-minute NoDa porch and golden-hour slots are filling fast - reply or book online to grab yours.
subject: Fall mini-sessions are open for booking

body: Your photos are ready! Your private online gallery is live and your prints are ready to order. Download instructions are inside - let me know if you'd like a Porch Light fine-art print.
subject: Your session gallery is ready to view

body: Thanks for booking with Larry Rawlings Photography! Your session is confirmed. I'll follow up to plan locations, wardrobe, and timing. Reply anytime with questions.
subject: Booking confirmed - let's plan your session

body: Here's what's new this season from the Porch Light print collection: three new Charlotte streetlight scenes, now available as framed and metal prints in the online shop.
subject: Porch Light print shop - new releases this season

body: Good news - your print order from Larry Rawlings Photography is on its way! A tracking note is coming shortly. Thanks for supporting local Charlotte photography.
subject: Your prints have shipped

body: Just a friendly reminder about your upcoming photo session with Larry Rawlings Photography. I'll text the meeting spot the morning of - looking forward to it!
subject: A quick reminder about your upcoming session

body: Thank you for working with Larry Rawlings Photography! If you have a moment, I'd love a quick note on how your session and gallery went. It helps a lot.
subject: How was your session? I'd love your feedback
